falsification_conditions.condition: The market closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate strong bullish momentum contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bearish blowoff

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 3x the 20-day average during a confirmed bullish breakout on the daily chart
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume surge would invalidate the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear market participation in a directional move

falsification_conditions.condition: A confirmed 'Bullish Engulfing' pattern forms on the S&P 500 with a 3% close above the previous day's high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This specific technical pattern would directly contradict the 'HOLD' signal by showing definitive buying pressure

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
